items.title: [Híbrido] Angular Front-End Developer Sênior na Sylision
items.description:
## Nossa empresa

A [Sylision](https://sylision.com) é uma plataforma de recrutamento de tecnologia que atua no Brasil e em Portugal. Recrutamos para empresas parceiras e usamos IA para cruzar o seu CV com todas as vagas compatíveis do nosso banco em segundos — você se candidata uma única vez.

## Descrição da vaga

Vaga de Front-End Developer (Angular) nível Sênior para atuar em projetos de empresas parceiras da Sylision.

Faixa salarial: R$ 12.000 a R$ 22.000/mês, conforme experiência.

## Local

Híbrido ou remoto, a combinar com a empresa contratante.

## Requisitos

**Obrigatórios:**
- Experiência sólida com Angular compatível com o nível Sênior
- Boas práticas de engenharia: versionamento, testes e code review

**Desejáveis:**
- Comunicação clara para trabalho remoto/distribuído
- Inglês para leitura de documentação

## Benefícios

- Faixa salarial transparente (R$ 12.000–22.000/mês)
- Benefícios variam conforme a empresa contratante (detalhados na conversa com o headhunter)

## Contratação

CLT ou PJ, conforme sua preferência e acordo com a empresa contratante.

## Como se candidatar

Candidate-se pela página da vaga: https://www.sylision.com/vagas/desenvolvedor-angular-senior

Basta enviar o CV uma vez — a IA da Sylision considera seu perfil para esta e para todas as vagas compatíveis, inclusive as que abrirem depois.

## Tempo médio de feedbacks

A IA da Sylision analisa o CV em minutos; quando há compatibilidade, um headhunter entra em contato em até 7 dias.
E-mail para contato em caso de não haver resposta: giovani@sylision.com

## Labels

#### Alocação
- Híbrido

#### Regime
- CLT
- PJ

#### Nível
- Sênior

items.title: VinMotion - Robotics System Engineer - Junior/Senior/Expert - Onsite/Hanoi - FTE
items.description:
**Department: Application Deployment
Location: Gia Lam, Ha Noi
Reports to: Head of System integration.**

**Job Summary:**

As a Software Engineer, you will be responsible for designing, developing, and implementing solutions for SLAM programs, localization, and navigation for robots …. 

**Responsibilities:
Senior:** 
- Define the overall architecture of robotic systems, including hardware, software, and communication frameworks.
- Ensure modularity and scalability in design for future upgrades and integrations
- Select appropriate computing platforms, middleware (e.g., ROS2), and networking solutions.
- Design and optimize advanced SLAM architectures (e.g., graph-based SLAM, deep learning-based SLAM).
- Lead the integration of multiple SLAM approaches (e.g., visual SLAM + LiDAR SLAM).
- Develop high-performance, scalable, and modular robotics software solutions.
- Architect real-time sensor fusion frameworks to enhance localization accuracy.
- Improve parallel computing and GPU acceleration for SLAM-related tasks.
- Mentor and guide junior engineers, conduct code reviews and technical training.
- Contribute to research and development by evaluating state-of-the-art SLAM techniques.
- Optimize robotics software for real-world deployment in harsh environments.
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define long-term SLAM strategies.
- Document code and write technical reports on development progress.

**Requirements:
Common:**

- Education: Bachelor's or higher in Robotics, Computer Science, Electrical/Mechanical Engineering, or a related field.
- SLAM Knowledge: Understanding of SLAM techniques (e.g., Visual SLAM, LiDAR SLAM, Graph-Based SLAM).
- Programming: Strong proficiency in Python (and optionally C++ for performance-critical tasks).
- Linux Development: Experience with Ubuntu, Bash scripting, system administration, and debugging tools.
- Robotics Frameworks: Experience with ROS2 (Robot Operating System), Gazebo, OpenCV, PCL.
- Algorithms & Mathematics: Understanding of linear algebra, optimization, and probability theory related to SLAM.
- Version Control: Familiarity with Git, GitHub/GitLab, and CI/CD workflows
- Testing: Writing unit tests and integration tests for robotic applications.

**Senior:**

- Advanced SLAM Expertise: Deep knowledge of SLAM backends, graph optimization, sensor fusion 
- Linux System Optimization: Experience with real-time Linux kernels, networking, and system performance tuning.
- High-Performance Computing: Knowledge of multithreading, GPU acceleration (CUDA, OpenCL)
- C++ Expertise: Strong proficiency in C++ (memory management, performance optimization, templates).
- Machine Learning in SLAM: Experience with deep learning-based SLAM (e.g., DeepVO, DROID-SLAM, SuperGlue, reinforcement learning)
- Project Leadership: Ability to architect, plan, and execute complex robotics projects.
- Mentorship & Code Review: Experience mentoring junior engineers and conducting rigorous code reviews.
- Industry Experience: Familiarity with real-world robot deployments in industrial, automotive, or research settings.
- Experience: 5+ years of experience in robotics software engineering, SLAM, or autonomous systems.

**Contact:**
Homepage: https://vinmotion.net/career/software-tester-automation
Email: v.thuyntp35@vinmotion.net
Phone number (Zalo/WhatsApp): +84 336 736 258

items.title: VinMotion - Full Stack Engineer, Robotics Simulation - Onsite/Hanoi - FTE
items.description:
**Position Overview**

We are seeking a highly capable Software Developer (Fullstack) to build and optimize simulation platforms, web applications, and software infrastructure supporting humanoid robot development.

**Key Responsibilities**

- Design, develop, and maintain fullstack applications supporting humanoid robot development.
- Build web-based platforms for robot simulation, monitoring, visualization, and experiment management.
- Develop backend services and APIs for robotics workflows and simulation pipelines.
- Integrate with robotics simulation environments such as: Isaac Sim, MuJoCo
- Optimize software performance, scalability, and reliability for large-scale simulation workloads.
- Collaborate with AI and Robotics teams to translate research requirements into production-ready software solutions.
- Build tools for simulation data management, experiment tracking, and analytics.
- Improve system architecture and software engineering best practices across the robotics platform ecosystem.

**Requirements**

- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Robotics, or a related field.
- Core Languages: Proficiency in C++ AND Python, Java (Hybrid architecture experience is highly preferred).
- Networking & Protocols: Strong experience in Socket Programming, specifically with UDP network bridges and WebSockets for real-time data streaming.
- Web 3D Graphics: Strong experience with React.js and modern state management libraries (e.g., Zustand, Redux, or Recoil) optimized for handling high-frequency, real-time data streaming; and WebGL, Three.js, or Python-based 3D visualization tools (e.g., Viser). Familiarity with Server-Side Rendering (SSR) and/or Client-side Rendering (CSR) and optimizing server-client channels for 3D scenes.
- Robotics (Plus): Experience with MuJoCo (MJCF/XML syntax), and optionally ROS 2.
- Data & Config: Familiarity with parsing runtime configurations (YAML) and handling high-density event logging formats (JSONL).

**Contact**:
Homepage: https://vinmotion.net/career/software-tester-automation
Email: v.thuyntp35@vinmotion.net
Phone number (Zalo/WhatsApp): +84 336 736 258

items.title: VinMotion - Machine Learning Scientist (VLA) - Senior/Expert - Onsite/Hanoi - FTE
items.description:
**About the job
Overview**

We're building humanoid robots that can understand instructions, perceive the world, and perform useful physical work in real environments.

As a Senior / Staff Machine Learning Engineer, Vision-Language-Action (VLA), you will help build the intelligence stack that connects vision, language, and action. You'll design, train, and deploy multimodal robot policies that allow humanoid robots to understand natural-language commands, interpret complex scenes, and take reliable actions in industrial and logistics settings.

This is a hands-on role at the intersection of multimodal model development, robot learning, teleoperation data, simulation, and real-world deployment. A core challenge of the role is learning robust robot behavior from limited real-world teleoperation data, while using simulation and synthetic data to improve generalization and close the sim-to-real gap.

You'll work closely with Teleoperation, Simulation, RL & Controls, and Platform teams to turn embodied AI research into robot capabilities that run on physical hardware.

**Key Responsibilities**

- Design, train, and improve vision-language-action (VLA) models for humanoid robots using visual observations, language instructions, and robot state
- Build and fine-tune multimodal robot policies using RGB (and optionally depth), language, proprioception, and task history
- Improve policy robustness, instruction following, manipulation reliability, and generalization to new tasks and environments
- Work with the Teleoperation team to improve data quality, dataset curation, logging standards, and episode QA
- Develop training strategies for limited-data settings, including augmentation, pretraining, imitation learning, and offline RL where appropriate
- Use simulation and synthetic data to improve robustness and sim-to-real transfer
- Define evaluation metrics for task success, robustness, and safety, and use ablations / failure analysis to guide model improvements
- Collaborate with Platform and Controls teams to integrate policies into the on-robot inference stack under latency and memory constraints

For Senior-level hires: independently own a workstream from experimentation through deployment iteration

For Staff-level hires: help shape technical direction across policy learning, data strategy, evaluation, and sim-to-real roadmap

**Required Qualifications:

Core skill**

- Strong background in deep learning for vision, multimodal learning, sequence modeling, or robot learning
- Hands-on experience training models in PyTorch
- Strong Python engineering skills, including training pipelines, experiment management, debugging, and reproducibility

**Experience in at least one of the following:**

+ Vision-language / multimodal model training
+ Imitation learning / behavior cloning / offline reinforcement learning
+ Robot learning from demonstration, teleoperation, or real-world interaction data

**General**

- Ability to work effectively across ML, robotics, controls, hardware, and platform teams
- Experience owning technical problems end-to-end, from experimentation through evaluation and iteration
- BS / MS / PhD in Computer Science, Robotics, Electrical Engineering, or a related field — or equivalent industry experience

**Preferred Qualifications**

- Experience training policies for real robots, especially manipulation or articulated systems
- Experience working with teleoperation or demonstration data
- Experience with simulation / synthetic-data pipelines for robotics
- Familiarity with modern VLA and robot-policy approaches such as VLM-backbone policies (Pi0-, GR00T-, or OpenVLA-class), diffusion policy / flow-matching action heads, or ACT-style action chunking
- Experience deploying models under production constraints such as latency, memory, mixed precision, or on-device / on-robot inference
- Prior experience in humanoid robotics, embodied AI, robot manipulation, or applied multimodal systems
- Tech stack includes: PyTorch, ROS 2, Isaac Sim / Isaac Lab, MuJoCo, GPU training infrastructure, and on-robot inference optimization.

**Contact:**
Homepage: https://vinmotion.net/career/software-tester-automation
Email: v.thuyntp35@vinmotion.net
Phone number (Zalo/WhatsApp): +84 336 736 258

items.title: VinMotion - Software Automation Test - Onsite/Hanoi - FT
items.description:
**Job Description**

**Functional Testing**

- Develop and implement test plans to ensure the functionality, performance, and quality of robotic products.
- Analyze product requirements and technical specifications to design comprehensive test cases and testing scenarios.
- Execute testing activities, evaluate results, and prepare test reports.
- Identify, document, and track defects; collaborate with relevant stakeholders to analyze root causes and drive corrective actions.
- Validate system functionality and performance against defined requirements and quality standards.

**Test Automation**

- Develop and maintain automated testing tools and frameworks to improve testing efficiency and coverage.
- Support continuous improvement initiatives for test processes and quality assurance methodologies.

**Cross-functional Collaboration**

- Work closely with product team to ensure product quality throughout the development lifecycle.
- Coordinate with internal departments, external partners, and stakeholders to resolve quality-related issues.
- Provide quality feedback and recommendations to support product enhancements.

**Other Responsibilities**

Perform additional tasks and assignments as directed by the line manager.

**Your Skills and Experience

Education**

- Bachelor's degree or higher in Electrical Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Automation, Mechatronics, Computer Science, Embedded Systems, Robotics, or related fields

**Experience**

- Minimum 3 years of experience in software, robotics, electronics, or automation testing
- Experience in developing test plans and test cases based on product requirements and technical specifications
- hands-on experience in functional testing, product validation, and quality assurance processes
- Familiarity with quality management and defect tracking tools such as Jira, Confluence, or equivalent platforms
- Experience in developing automation testing solutions is a strong advantage

**Why You'll Love Working Here

Why Join Us?**

- Be part of a groundbreaking team shaping the future of robotics and AI
- Work in a dynamic, fast-paced environment with opportunities for growth
- Competitive compensation and benefits package

items.title: [HCM] Senior | Tech Lead Full Stack Software Engineer  - Full Time - Hybrid working
items.description:
## About BonBon

Backed by a major corporation, Bonbon is a funded startup in the mobility sector. We have huge market potential 

We are a small, high-trust team building product that matters for the garage and car-owner ecosystem. In our first two years we are intentionally staying small - growing from a couple of engineers to around five - and optimizing for execution speed, ownership, and product quality over headcount. This is a founding-engineer role: you will own a meaningful product area end to end and help set the technical and cultural bar for everyone who joins after you.

## Work Location

This role is based out of our Ho Chi Minh City office and follows a hybrid schedule: onsite Tuesday through Friday and remote on Mondays, unless an approved accommodation applies. We place a high value on in-person collaboration and building a strong in-office culture.

## What You Bring

- Strong fundamentals and around 6+ years of professional software development, or a clear track record of comparable ownership and impact. We weigh evidence of judgment, ownership, and speed over years and company logos.
- Experience designing and delivering highly-available, scalable cloud-based systems.
- Backend in at least one managed language such as Go, Java, Scala, C#, or similar (we build the backend in Go).
- Comfort across the front end - building product UI with a modern framework such as React / Next.js. ( Mobile experienced is a plus )
- Experience integrating AI-assisted development tools into real engineering workflows, with a habit of verifying their output.
- A strong sense of how AI can improve developer productivity, system design, and operational efficiency.
- High ownership, low ego, clear written communication, and the ability to thrive in ambiguity and shifting priorities.
- Genuine customer empathy - you understand why the product matters and let that guide tradeoffs.


Details JD: https://succulent-dewberry-6d4.notion.site/Senior-Full-Stack-Engineer-Founding-Team-38a6bc8451658171872ec2b52df6f80d?source=copy_link


### Open salary

Contact: 
- email: bonbondevvn@gmail.com 
- slack ( webuild ) : @hung.vu

items.title: [Remoto] UX Designer na Botcity
items.description:
## Nossa empresa

BotCity is building the future of automation with the Governance Platform for Python automations and AI Agents. We empower enterprises to innovate at scale, bringing governance, control, and observability to every automation project. Our philosophy is simple: automation is software, and software deserves the same high-code standards that drive innovation in AI and machine learning.

We recently raised a $12M Series A, led by Four Rivers with participation from Y Combinator, SoftBank, and top industry leaders such as Lew Cirne (New Relic), Rod Johnson (Spring Source), and Walter Kortschak (Summit Partners | Firestreak Ventures). With 1,000+ customers in 70+ countries, including Bayer and LG, and recognition by G2 (2024) as one of the world’s top 25 emerging platforms, BotCity is scaling fast.

We’re a global remote company with teams across the US and LATAM, united by a shared vision to redefine how enterprises build and manage automation. If you’re looking for an environment that values impact, autonomy, and excellence, we’d love for you to join us on this journey.

## Descrição da vaga

Role Overview

The UX Designer will own the end-to-end design of features across our three product surfaces — platform, agent, and web portal — turning complex business and technical challenges into intuitive, responsive user experiences. This is a hands-on, generalist role for someone who thrives in the fast-paced, high-uncertainty environment of an early-stage B2B SaaS product. You will design from sketches and wireframes through high-fidelity prototypes and developer-ready specs, help us build our first Design System from the ground up, and support discovery alongside the team when opportunities arise. In this position, you will work closely with our UX Lead and partner directly with the PM (who is also our CTO)

 
Responsibilities

Design end-to-end: from initial sketches and wireframes to high-fidelity, responsive prototypes across the platform, agent, and web portal.
Produce high-fidelity screens and detailed specifications in Figma (English and pt-BR), ensuring the development team has everything needed for precise implementation.
Help build and evolve BotCity's first Design System — components, patterns, and tokens — in partnership with the UX Lead and the front-end team.
Analyze existing functionalities and propose UX improvements to reduce friction and enhance user efficiency.
Build interactive prototypes to test usability and communicate complex flows to stakeholders.
Support discovery alongside the UX Lead and the PM: run qualitative interviews, map user journeys, and validate hypotheses and prototypes with B2B clients when needed.
Transform findings into clear UX artifacts (User Journey Maps, Personas) and documented insights shared with the team.
Partner with Product, Engineering, and Customer Success to ensure design solutions align with technical constraints and business goals.

## Local

Remoto

## Requisitos

Experience (3+ years) as a UX/Product Designer working end-to-end on digital products.
Demonstrable portfolio featuring end-to-end UX projects (from problem to delivered interface).
Strong UI and high-fidelity prototyping in Figma, at a level that supports end-to-end delivery.
Ability to design responsive interfaces across web (and mobile where applicable).
Experience building or contributing to Design Systems (components, patterns, tokens, libraries).
Comfortable supporting discovery: qualitative interviews, usability testing (remote or A/B), and mapping
Critical User Journeys.
Ability to translate findings into clear insights, opportunities, and recommendations.
Experience with Design Thinking and agile methodologies.
UX/usability tools (Figma, UserTesting, Maze); MS Office/Excel, Google Suite, Notion.
Ability to travel as needed to support events and meet the team.
Portuguese — Fluent.
English — Intermediary/Advanced.

**Desejáveis:**
Prior experience with B2B products.
Prior experience in an early-stage, high-growth, fast-paced startup environment.
Familiarity with technical products (developer tooling, automation, Python, or AI a plus).
Proven experience leading research, thematic analysis, and A/B testing.



## Contratação

PJ

## Como se candidatar

Enviar candidatura pela página de carreiras: https://jobs.quickin.io/botcity/jobs/6a482f8d0ad5470013bb28b3?src=Github

## Tempo médio de feedbacks

Costumamos enviar feedbacks em até 15 dias após cada processo.
E-mail para contato em caso de não haver resposta: recruiting@botcity.dev

## Labels
- Remoto
- PJ
- Pleno

items.title: [REMOTO] QA Lead na Botcity
items.description:
## Descrição da vaga


Role Overview

The QA Lead will be responsible for scaling the entire quality assurance function, blending strategic people leadership with a hands-on technical approach to drive excellence across every product delivery. You will be responsible for expanding automated test coverage, reducing the lead time between development completion and validated delivery, and defining the QA processes that keep our team both rigorous and agile. This role is built for someone obsessed with quality and product excellence, who brings strong organizational discipline, a comprehensive automation mindset, and the ability to lead a team while staying deeply connected to the technical work, measuring what matters through clear KPIs and continuously raising the bar for how great software ships. This role will report to the VP of Engineering.

 
Responsibilities

Lead, mentor, and coach the QA team, conducting regular 1:1s and career development planning.
Manage the distribution of QA engineers across squads, implementing a rotation strategy.
Design and implement a robust automation roadmap, prioritizing regression testing to maximize platform stability.
Build and maintain automated flows that simulate real user behavior across web and desktop environments (using Python or Java).
Continuously increase automated test coverage to proactively identify edge cases and prevent production incidents.
Optimize the "development-to-delivery" window by refining validation processes without compromising quality standards.
Act as a focal point for incident management, triaging bugs alongside developers and ensuring swift resolution and root-cause analysis.
Collaborate closely with engineering team to ensure the QA process is mature, solid, and aligned with agile delivery cycles.
Define and monitor key performance indicators (KPIs) through Jira, such as response times, validation cycles, and defect leakage.
Evangelize QA best practices within the engineering team to ensure quality is a shared responsibility.
Provide regular reports to senior management regarding the health of the area, automation progress, and product stability.

## Local de trabalho
- 100% Remoto

## Requisitos da vaga

Required Qualifications 

Bachelor's degree in Information Technology, Computer Science or related field.
Prior hands-on experience with software testing automation ( 5+ years).
Proven experience in leading and scaling QA teams.
Experience in at least one programming/scripting language (Python or Java).
Experience testing both Web and Desktop applications.
Communicates with clarity and collaborative humility.
Drives action with bold decisiveness and consistently insisting on high standards to deliver with speed and confidence.
Familiarity with Behavior-driven development (BDD).
Familiarity with test automation tools such as Postman, Selenium, Playwright, Behave.
Experience with development of Automated Pipelines (preferably with GitHub Actions).
Experience with Atlassian Jira.
Experience working with MS Office/Excel, Google Suite, Notion.
Portuguese - Fluent.
English - Advanced.
Ability to travel as needed to support events and meet the team.

Preferred Qualifications

Familiarity with Agile/Scrum methodologies.
Prior experience in an early-stage, high-growth, and fast-paced startup environment.
Experience with version control systems (e.g., Git).


## Forma de contratação

PJ


## Sobre a empresa

BotCity is building the future of automation with the Governance Platform for Python automations and AI Agents. We empower enterprises to innovate at scale, bringing governance, control, and observability to every automation project. Our philosophy is simple: automation is software, and software deserves the same high-code standards that drive innovation in AI and machine learning.

We recently raised a $12M Series A, led by Four Rivers with participation from Y Combinator, SoftBank, and top industry leaders such as Lew Cirne (New Relic), Rod Johnson (Spring Source), and Walter Kortschak (Summit Partners | Firestreak Ventures). With 1,000+ customers in 70+ countries, including Bayer and LG, and recognition by G2 (2024) as one of the world’s top 25 emerging platforms, BotCity is scaling fast.

We’re a global remote company with teams across the US and LATAM, united by a shared vision to redefine how enterprises build and manage automation. If you’re looking for an environment that values impact, autonomy, and excellence, we’d love for you to join us on this journey.


## Como se candidatar

Enviar candidatura pela nossa página de carreiras: https://jobs.quickin.io/botcity/jobs/6a1dee39952eb0001301e941?src=Github

## Tempo médio de feedbacks

Costumamos enviar feedbacks em até 15 dias após cada processo.

E-mail para contato em caso de não haver resposta: recruiting@botcity.dev

## Labels
- PJ
- Especialista
- Remoto

items.title: [Remoto] Frontend Engineer @Botcity
items.description:
Company Overview

BotCity is building the future of automation with the Governance Platform for Python automations and AI Agents. We empower enterprises to innovate at scale, bringing governance, control, and observability to every automation project. Our philosophy is simple: automation is software, and software deserves the same high-code standards that drive innovation in AI and machine learning.

We recently raised a $12M Series A, led by Four Rivers with participation from Y Combinator, SoftBank, and top industry leaders such as Lew Cirne (New Relic), Rod Johnson (Spring Source), and Walter Kortschak (Summit Partners | Firestreak Ventures). With 1,000+ customers in 70+ countries, including Bayer and LG, and recognition by G2 (2024) as one of the world’s top 25 emerging platforms, BotCity is scaling fast.

We’re a global remote company with teams across the US and LATAM, united by a shared vision to redefine how enterprises build and manage automation. If you’re looking for an environment that values impact, autonomy, and excellence, we’d love for you to join us on this journey.

 
Role Overview

This Frontend Engineer will be responsible for driving the development of intuitive, high-performance user interfaces that simplify how developers manage increasingly complex frontend applications. By consistently deploying user-friendly features and maintaining a high-quality codebase, this role ensures the delivery of performant products that directly enhance user satisfaction and align with our long-term strategic growth. We are looking for a resilient and autonomous professional with a proven track record in product-focused companies, specifically one who has experience working on core product features and thrives in highly collaborative environments alongside UX and Engineering teams. This role will report to the CTO.

 
Responsibilities

Develop, deploy, and maintain scalable, responsive web applications using modern front-end technologies (focus on desktop with some mobile, which could evolve with time).
Collaborate with product managers and UX/UI designers to understand requirements, ensure its technical feasibility, and translate them into technical, user-friendly solutions.
Maintain and improve the company’s front-end codebase by refactoring legacy code and implementing best practices ensuring performance across multiple devices and browsers.
Participate in code reviews, ensuring best practices in front-end development.
Identify and troubleshoot front-end issues to ensure a seamless user experience.
Write reusable code and libraries for future use, optimizing components for maximum speed.
 

Requirements
Required Qualifications

Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, or related technical discipline.
Proven professional experience (3+ years) in front-end development, preferably in product-focused companies and working in complex projects alongside Product/UX/UI teams.
Proficiency in HTML, CSS, JavaScript and TypeScript, with expertise on React
Familiarity with RESTful APIs and working alongside back-end development teams.
Experience working with authentication and authorization mechanisms using OAuth, JWT, or SAML.
Experience with testing frameworks (e.g., Jest, Cypress) for front-end applications.
Experience with version control and project management systems, particularly Git and GitHub.
Ability to work independently as well as part of a team, with strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail.
Experience working with modern async communication and documentation tools (e.g., Slack, Notion)
Ability to travel as needed to meet the team.
English - Advanced (Reading, Comprehension, and Writing).
Portuguese - Fluent
 
Preferred Qualifications

Relevant hands-on experience with desktop-first products in a tech-intensive industry, such as dashboards featuring complex data visualizations and interactive charts
Experience with Vite, Webpack, Babel, and other build tools for optimizing front-end workflows.
Experience in building responsive layouts and ensuring cross-browser compatibility.
Experience with SSR-capable frameworks (eg., Next.js, Remix
Experience with secure data storage and handling sensitive information (e.g., encryption, tokenization).
Experience implementing secure front-end authentication/session patterns to protect user data, including proper input sanitization, secure JWT/cookie handling, safe browser storage choices and alignment with OWASP guidance.
Prior experience in an early-stage, high-growth and fast-paced startup (or similar) environment.

Apply to https://jobs.quickin.io/botcity/jobs/69fa295871686e001273d170?src=Github

items.title: [Remoto] Python Developer - RPA @ Botcity
items.description:
### Nossa empresa

BotCity is building the future of automation with the Governance Platform for Python automations and AI Agents. We empower enterprises to innovate at scale, bringing governance, control, and observability to every automation project. Our philosophy is simple: automation is software, and software deserves the same high-code standards that drive innovation in AI and machine learning.

We recently raised a $12M Series A, led by Four Rivers with participation from Y Combinator, SoftBank, and top industry leaders such as Lew Cirne (New Relic), Rod Johnson (Spring Source), and Walter Kortschak (Summit Partners | Firestreak Ventures). With 1,000+ customers in 70+ countries, including Bayer and LG, and recognition by G2 (2024) as one of the world’s top 25 emerging platforms, BotCity is scaling fast.

We’re a global remote company with teams across the US and LATAM, united by a shared vision to redefine how enterprises build and manage automation. If you’re looking for an environment that values impact, autonomy, and excellence, we’d love for you to join us on this journey.

### Descrição da vaga

Role Overview

The Python Developer will be responsible for design, develop, and deliver automation projects that ensure performance, scalability, and customer impact for BotCity’s clients. This role is critical to maintaining high-quality code, smooth delivery, and strong customer experience across Professional Services engagements. The ideal professional is a passionate Python developer who builds clean, reliable automation solutions, communicates effectively while prioritizing the customer experience, and thrives as a collaborative, adaptable team player in a fast-changing environment.  This role reports to the Delivery Manager.

 
Responsibilities

Gather and analyze client requirements, propose automation solutions, and design workflows aligned with business goals.
Develop, test, and deploy Python automations using BotCity’s platform and best practices.
Write clean, maintainable, and reusable code, following team standards, reviews, and version control processes (Git).
Monitor, debug, and optimize automations to ensure reliability and performance in production.
Document processes, code, and architecture clearly for both technical and non-technical audiences.
Provide technical support and training during project handover or customer onboarding.
Collaborate closely with project managers, QA, and clients to ensure successful and timely project delivery.
Identify and implement improvements in development practices, tooling, and project workflows.



### Local

Remoto

### Requisitos

Requirements
Bachelor’s degree or equivalent experience in Computer Science, Information Systems, or related field.
Professional experience (2+ years) in Python development.
Relevant hands-on experience with automation or RPA projects.
Proven experience with Git version control system and GitHub Flow.
Solid understanding of APIs, data manipulation, error handling, and debugging.
Strong problem-solving skills and ability to adapt quickly to new business contexts.
Excellent communication and presentation skills with clients and internal stakeholders.
Experience working with MS Office/Excel, Google Suite, Notion, Slack.
Ability to travel as needed to support events and meet the team.
Portuguese - Fluent.
English - Advanced.

Preferred Qualifications

Experience in professional services, IT consulting, or technical implementation.
Familiarity with BotCity tools.
Experience with Agile methodologies.
Prior experience in an early-stage, high-growth, and fast-paced startup environment.

### Benefícios

Cartão flexível
Auxilio Saúde
Auxilio Idiomas
Seguro de Vida
Wellhub
Conexa
Política de Time off

### Contratação

PJ

### Como se candidatar

Enviar candidatura pela página de carreiras: https://jobs.quickin.io/botcity/jobs/6a19d88cd26f2200134fa876?src=Github

### Tempo médio de feedbacks

Costumamos enviar feedback até 15 dias depois da candidatura

### Keywords

RPA

### Alocação

- [ ] Alocado
- [x] Remoto
- [ ] Presencial
- [ ] Híbrido

### Regime

- [x] PJ
- [ ] CLT
- [ ] Estágio
- [ ] Cooperado
- [ ] Freela

### Nível

- [ ] Júnior
- [x] Pleno
- [x] Sênior
- [ ] Especialista

### Período

- [x] Full time
- [ ] Part Time
- [ ] Projeto

### Remuneração

None
